column1: Hey Anthony, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Not rlly sure where im Go lowk didnt kno i was gon have to txt someone to see the options Anyway march 8th to 14th theres 6 of us
All good bro. just easier this way so we can get you an exact quote for the group
Which destination were you looking at
Yea both are smooth. I'll personally be in Punta Cana
You got a ballpark on how many ppl in your group?
Word word. my cousin went there a few years ago. heard the party scene aint bad!
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get started?
Yea lowells p cool gotta make the most of it lol
Yea whenever tbh j interested in pricing
bet I got you. I'll send what we have now but keep in min d prices are changing quickly with everyone making their bookings rn
I'll add in a discount and a payment plan to make it easier on everyone
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
bet! just sent that over lmk if it came through
What is a spring break host
its our on site staff. so we hav staff there with you 24/7 to help you with check in, navigating the resort, making adjustments, communicating with hotel staff that speak spanish, etc
It's super helpful to have. so you dont have to figure out everything on your own in a foreign country
Is the from price the total or the per night
total per person. for the entire stay!
how many beds are there per room. Im rly asking, If we did the 3 person per room option would anyone have to share a bed
2 double beds. in between a queen size and full size. so yea 3 ppls two of you would have to share a bed
super common tho most people do it. youre barely in the room tbh
So what if we did the 2 ppl per room
It would be the 2 person room rate. depending on which destination youre looking at. just click on the sample quote link, hit view quote, and scroll down to the 2 per room section. itll show the rate
I meant would anyone have to share a bed if we did that
yoo my b bro was on a commute. but no you wouldn't, at check in we can make sure you get 2 beds in the room
yoo Anthony whats good bro, how we feelin about the options so far?
P good j been chattin w the fellas ab it
Is there a date i gotta book by
Ill tell em if there is might speed things up
Tbr bro it's just a race against when things sell out. Ppl been booking like crazy
So first the price goes up, then it sells out
When are finals done for you?
yerr Anthony whats good bro, hows the squad lookin for spring break?
Yea bit too early for us rn prob gonna book smth else ina month or 2
Oh man, yea tbr things prolly gonna be sold out by then
All g we will find smth
Aight just hmu when y'all ready and I'll let you know what we got
sup! we still looking to get situated for spring break?
whats up Anthony did y'all still need help with spring break or you all set?
yoo Anthony did y'all get to book anything for spring break yet
U still got anything for punta cana
Yea we'd just have to move pretty quickly
How many ppl do we have now
Yea we can do the 9th to 13th. With four of you it'll be $646 per person for the all inclusive stay
The deposit is $200 to secure and then remaining balance due in 10 days
Occidental Punta Cana. That's where all of our college groups and parties are
I'll be there during your week too
Yea we got Riu Republica too. Is the group 21+ ?
oh bet bet! ill send you a link that shows both prices
Could i get a price for the 7-14th of march
cool yea so 7 nights? gonna be a little pricey ngl
Yea we just wondering how much more
Yea we prob will j do the 4 days lmao
Yea 4 days is the way to go lol. I'lll make the res for yall rn and send over. You'll each slot I to an open slot and make your deposits to secure things
Then you get 10ish days to make the final balance payment, gives you a little time
We wanna do Riu Republica or Occidental Punta Cana?
Will send in 20 so yall can get secured
just sent that over bro my b on the delay
its all good to go. sent to email
Word do i need to make payment tn? Im not even home rn dont got my passport or anything on me but i can tomorrow
yea you dont need your passport info rn you can skip over that spot
yea not the full tho just the deposit to secure
got time tho dont gotta be right this moment
So like by midnight? I thot i had a day to pay it not 3 hours
Might have to chalk it then i aint home rn im tryna look over everything before i pay
I'll see if I can get it extended. had to put the request in to get it open
rooms are slim at the Riu
I feel not tryna be a force but yk how it is cant b throwin money around an dont wanna waste ur time
yea all good bro. I'll lyk soon as possible
yooo green light, we good for tomorrow
if you have any questions in the am just text me
Bettt i appreciate u helpin us out brodie
if you have any questions in the am just hit me
yerr whats good my brotha. were y'all able to get settled in on the reservation
this flight isnt too bad. $415 but you'll have to add bags https://www.google.com/travel/flights/s/wRagFYTr54UipxHeA
damn my bad bro aint mean to send you that lol. was for someone else
Anthony whats good bro. did you still need that reservation for Riu Republica
Cant coordinate nothin w these fools
yoyo whats good bro whats everyones status
Well like we cna still pay they just didnt do it when i told then to lmfao
yall able to do it this afternoon?
If there are more slots can we add ppl?
yea we can do that. 2 rooms of 3
or did you want 3 rooms of 2
Would it be more expensive than it already is to add an extra room of 2 people?
nah same price per person just an additional room
Yeah yeah can we do that
bet. lets get it in asap bro
Whats the checkout time on friday?
word which airport we lookin to fly out of
this the best overall I found, non stop https://www.google.com/travel/flights/s/cZJ1SzBSW4YiSY8C9
wouldnt worry much about the check out time. they dont kick you off the resort immediately at 11. you can still do your thing until its time to leave to your flight. just gotta be out of your room
One of us is at work so waiting on him. What time do we have until?
We tryna book everything today before flights go up
3, same deal tho. dont worry about the time, you can still use the resort on arrival, eat drink etc, just may need to wait a little for rooms
obv dont arrive at 8am lol but yea
Yo so one of his decided they dont wanna come no more. Tryna find a replacement today
yoyo any word on William Krupa, he rolling with us?
whats good big dog. Will Krupa says he's no longer going. do you want to have Haddington join your room?
Yea we aint goin no mo
Word all good. Add Haddington to your room?
yoyo did we want to add Haddington to yours
yerr what's good bro, did we just wanna rock with the room of 3?
whats good bro whats the update on the trip
